ttl.name: DOOR CONTROL TRANSMITTER (w/o Smart Key System)

s3.ptxt: Using a screwdriver with its tip wrapped in protective tape, pry open the transmitter housing cover.

atten3.ptxt: Do not use excessive force when prying open the housing cover.

s2.ptxt: Remove the door control transmitter module from the transmitter housing case.
Using a coin, or other flat object, pry open the transmitter cover.

item.ptxt: Do not push the terminals with your finger.
Do not forcibly pry up the battery (lithium battery) because doing so will deform the terminals.
Do not touch the battery with wet hands. Water may result in corrosion.
Do not touch or move any components inside the transmitter because handling the components may interfere with proper operation of the transmitter.
